heading: Recovery of fair value of placing Department of Defense payloads in orbit with space launch system
label: 70101 Recovery of fair value of placing Department of Defense payloads in orbit with space launch system
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, or any interagency agreement, the Administrator shall charge such prices as are necessary to recover the fair value of placing Department of Defense payloads into orbit by means of the space launch system.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)70101.42 U.S.C. 2464, , .Pub. L. 97–324, title I, § 106(a)96 Stat. 1600Oct. 15, 1982
Amendments2015— substituted “space launch system” for “space shuttle” in section catchline and text.Pub. L. 114–90
